mapper.sql:
SELECT /*+ LEADING(A B) */ cmmn_cd,
cmmn_cd_nm, cmmn_cd_dc,
cmmn_cd_dc AS cmmn_cd_nm, cmmn_cd_nm AS cmmn_cd_dc,
upper_cmmn_cd, usr_dfn_vu1, elcpwstn_cd, elcpwstn_nm, elcpwstn_cls_cd, dsply_ordr, hq_cd, sap_bplc_vu, cstct_vu, cstct_nm FROM ( SELECT cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm, cmmn_cd_dc, upper_cmmn_cd, usr_dfn_vu1 FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_2003' ) A, ( SELECT elcpwstn_cd, elcpwstn_nm, elcpwstn_cls_cd, dsply_ordr, hq_cd, sap_bplc_vu, cstct_vu, ( SELECT stext FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE SYSDATE BETWEEN strdt AND enddt AND objid IN ( SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN MIN(depth) OVER(PARTITION BY kostl) = depth THEN objid ELSE NULL END FROM HRM.vm_hr01a01 WHERE SYSDATE BETWEEN strdt AND enddt AND TRIM(kostl) IS NOT NULL ) AND kostl = LPAD(cstct_vu, 10, '0') ) AS cstct_nm FROM WRO.tc_eg10101 ) B WHERE A.usr_dfn_vu1 = B.elcpwstn_cd(+)
AND IN ( SELECT objid FROM (
) WHERE 1 = 1 AND cmmn_cd = #{ecsBasinDivCd} )
AND A.upper_cmmn_cd
IN
NOT IN
( SELECT elcpwstn_cls_cd FROM ( SELECT /*+ LEADING(B A) */ A.cmmn_cd AS elcpwstn_cls_cd, A.cmmn_cd_nm AS elcpwstn_cls_cd_nm, B.cmmn_cd, B.cmmn_cd_nm FROM ( SELECT cmmn_cd, REGEXP_SUBSTR(cmmn_cd_nm, '[^(]+') AS cmmn_cd_nm FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_1001' ) A LEFT JOIN ( SELECT cmmn_cd, cmmn_cd_nm FROM tc_ecs_cd WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND cls_cd = 'ECS_9003' ) B ON A.cmmn_cd_nm = B.cmmn_cd_nm WHERE B.cmmn_cd IS NOT NULL ) )
AND elcpwstn_cls_cd = ( SELECT elcpwstn_cls_cd FROM (
) WHERE cmmn_cd = #{ecsSetcscDivCd} )
ORDER BY dsply_ordr
mapper.update: /* TM_CL22001_Dao_saveRecExcclcSnpwList */ MERGE INTO tm_cl22001 A USING ( SELECT #{recDelngYear} AS rec_delng_year, LPAD(#{recDelngMt}, 2, '0') AS rec_delng_mt, #{recEqpCdNm} AS rec_eqp_cd_nm, #{recExcclcSbmtQy} AS rec_excclc_sbmt_qy, #{recExcclcTm1sAmt} AS rec_excclc_tm1s_amt, #{recExcclcTm2sAmt} AS rec_excclc_tm2s_amt, #{recExcclcTm3sAmt} AS rec_excclc_tm3s_amt, #{recExcclcTm4sAmt} AS rec_excclc_tm4s_amt, #{recAccnutSnrn} AS rec_accnut_snrn, #{frstRgstrId} AS frst_rgstr_id, #{lastUpdusrId} AS last_updusr_id, #{updtRsn} AS updt_rsn FROM DUAL ) B ON ( A.rec_delng_year = B.rec_delng_year AND A.rec_delng_mt = B.rec_delng_mt AND A.rec_eqp_cd_nm = B.rec_eqp_cd_nm ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.rec_excclc_sbmt_qy = B.rec_excclc_sbmt_qy, A.rec_excclc_tm1s_amt = B.rec_excclc_tm1s_amt, A.rec_excclc_tm2s_amt = B.rec_excclc_tm2s_amt, A.rec_excclc_tm3s_amt = B.rec_excclc_tm3s_amt, A.rec_excclc_tm4s_amt = B.rec_excclc_tm4s_amt, A.rec_accnut_snrn = B.rec_accnut_snrn, A.last_updt_dt = SYSDATE, A.last_updusr_id = B.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn = B.updt_rsn WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( A.rec_delng_year, A.rec_delng_mt, A.rec_eqp_cd_nm, A.rec_excclc_sbmt_qy, A.rec_excclc_tm1s_amt, A.rec_excclc_tm2s_amt, A.rec_excclc_tm3s_amt, A.rec_excclc_tm4s_amt, A.rec_accnut_snrn, A.frst_regist_dt, A.frst_rgstr_id, A.last_updt_dt, A.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn ) VALUES ( B.rec_delng_year, B.rec_delng_mt, B.rec_eqp_cd_nm, B.rec_excclc_sbmt_qy, B.rec_excclc_tm1s_amt, B.rec_excclc_tm2s_amt, B.rec_excclc_tm3s_amt, B.rec_excclc_tm4s_amt, B.rec_accnut_snrn, SYSDATE, B.frst_rgstr_id, SYSDATE, B.last_updusr_id, B.updt_rsn )
